summary: Payroll Module comprehensive testing completed. Fixed critical runtime error in Advances.jsx (Select.Item empty value bug). All 7 Payroll pages verified working. 36/37 backend tests passing (1 test data issue).

fixed.issue: Select.Item value='' causing 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' runtime error - crashed the entire Advances page
fixed.fix: Changed empty string to 'none' value and updated form submission to convert 'none' -> null

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 x -1) on dashboard - consider adding minWidth/minHeight or error boundary
Multiple 'Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' - accessibility concern but non-blocking

success_rate.backend: 97% (36/37 tests passed - 1 test data conflict, not a bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 pages load, CRUD operations work, payroll workflow verified)

seed_data_creation: Test created: 1 department, 1 employee, multiple leave requests, advances, payrolls - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll module fully functional. Critical bug in Advances.jsx fixed. All pages accessible: /departments, /employees, /salary-structure, /leave-management, /advances, /payroll, /payroll-reports. HR/Payroll section visible in sidebar. Payroll workflow (create→submit→approve→process) verified working.
test_flows_verified: Departments CRUD - Create, list, update, delete (with employee check) working
Employees CRUD - All 4 types (permanent, casual, freelancer, contract) tested via API and UI
Employee View Details - Leave balances (14 Annual, 7 Sick, 7 Casual) and advances (LKR 97,500) displayed correctly
Salary Structure - EPF/ETF rates (8%/12%/3%), overtime rates (1.25x/1.5x), add/delete allowances working
Leave Management - Create request, approve, reject, update balance all working
Advances & Loans - Issue advance with recovery months calculation (LKR 15000 / LKR 3000 = ~5 months) working after fix
Payroll Processing - Create (PAY-202603-0004), submit, approve, process with journal entries working
Payroll Reports - Summary (2 payrolls, LKR 355,000 gross, LKR 306,900 net), EPF/ETF, Department reports working
